quota_note: No quota error returned by the API. Empty arrays may indicate: (1) Insights API quota exhausted for this billing account, (2) No data in the selected period, or (3) API permission scope missing insights_read permission
possible_causes: Google Business Profile Insights API quota exhausted
No insights data available for the 30-day period (restaurants may have low visibility)
Missing insights_read scope in OAuth token
Google account not linked to a Google Business Profile manager account
required_ceo_action: Check Google Business Profile API quota at console.cloud.google.com. Verify the service account has insights_read scope. Consider implementing screenshot fallback from Google Business Profile web interface.
